SEARCH
Package com.example.untoldpsproject.controllers

Class CartController

java.lang.Object
com.example.untoldpsproject.controllers.CartController
@RestController @CrossOrigin @RequestMapping("/cart") public class CartController extends Object
Controller class for managing cart operations.

  • Method Details

    • visualiseTickets

      @GetMapping("/customer/seetickets/{userId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView visualiseTickets(@PathVariable("userId") String userId)
      Displays the available tickets for the customer to visualize.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing the view name and the list of available tickets.

    • addTicketToCartForm

      @GetMapping("/customer/tickets/{userId}/addToCart/{ticketId}/{cartId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView addTicketToCartForm(@PathVariable("ticketId") String id, @PathVariable("userId") String userId, @PathVariable("cartId") String cartId)
      Adds a ticket to the cart.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the ticket to be added.
      userId - The ID of the user.
      cartId - The ID of the cart.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing a redirection URL.

    • visualizeCart

      @GetMapping("/visualizeCart/{cartId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView visualizeCart(@PathVariable("cartId") String cartId)
      Visualizes the content of the cart.
      Parameters:
      cartId - The ID of the cart.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing the view name and the cart details.

    • addTicketToCart

      @PostMapping("/customer/tickets/{userId}/addToCart/{ticketId}/{cartId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView addTicketToCart(@PathVariable("ticketId") String id, @PathVariable("userId") String userId, @PathVariable("cartId") String cartId)
      Adds a ticket to the cart.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the ticket to be added.
      userId - The ID of the user.
      cartId - The ID of the cart.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing a redirection URL.

    • removeItemFromCart

      @GetMapping("/removeItem/{cartItemId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView removeItemFromCart(@PathVariable("cartItemId") String cartItemId)
      Removes an item from the cart.
      Parameters:
      cartItemId - The ID of the cart item to be removed.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing a redirection URL.

    • placeOrderForm

      @GetMapping("/place-order/{userId}/{cartId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView placeOrderForm(@PathVariable("userId") String userId, @PathVariable("cartId") String cartId)
      Places an order.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user.
      cartId - The ID of the cart.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing a redirection URL.

    • placeOrder

      @PostMapping("/place-order/{userId}/{cartId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView placeOrder(@PathVariable("userId") String userId, @PathVariable("cartId") String cartId)
      Places an order.
      Parameters:
      userId - The ID of the user.
      cartId - The ID of the cart.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing a redirection URL.

    • visualizeOrder

      @GetMapping("/visualizeOrder/{orderId}") public org.springframework.web.servlet.ModelAndView visualizeOrder(@PathVariable("orderId") String orderId)
      Visualizes the placed order.
      Parameters:
      orderId - The ID of the order.
      Returns:
      A ModelAndView object containing the view name and the order details.
